name: Dak's Honeyed Beet Oat Bran Bread (Bread Machine)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Better for Bread white flour
8 oz Julienne beets, drained and saved
1 tbsp Liquid (such as water or milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Set the breadmaker's browning control to light.
2. Place all ingredients in the pan in the order listed: yeast, whole wheat flour, white flour, oat bran, oats, beets, honey, liquid, salt, gluten, cinnamon, and cloves.
3. Select "Oat/French" setting on the bread machine.
4. Push the Start button to bake the bread.
